title: rubus coillardii
intro: Rubus coillardii, also known as the African raspberry, is a type of bramble or thorny shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves and fruits are used to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Rubus coillardii include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and skin irritations. Rubus coillardii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used as a topical treatment for wounds and skin conditions.
